rootCause: Cron payload invoked via sh -lc 'bash ...' but macOS /bin/bash is bash 3.2 which does not support declare -A. Script is written for zsh.
changes: Cron payload argv changed from sh -lc 'bash ... && bash ...' to zsh -lc 'zsh ... && zsh ...'
Added zsh guard at top of scripts/linkedin-token-health.sh: exits 2 if ZSH_VERSION is unset
verified: zsh scripts/linkedin-token-health.sh --all --dry-run exits 0 under zsh; exits 2 under bash
